name: AbuseIPDB
tagline: Check IP addresses for reported abuse
description: Inspect an IPv4 or IPv6 address against AbuseIPDB reports and confidence data.

auth.hint: Create an AbuseIPDB API key and send it in the Key header.

tools.name: check_ip_address
tools.description: Return abuse reports and confidence information for an IP address.

params.name: ipAddress
params.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to inspect.

params.name: maxAgeInDays
params.description: Maximum report age from 1 through 365 days; defaults to 30.

params.name: verbose
params.description: Include verbose report and country data when true.
